office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Brian Burnett faces challenger Stacy Willoughby.

candidates.summary: Burnett is an incumbent representative and former Chelan County sheriff emphasizing public safety and fiscal restraint.
highlights: Emphasizes public safety, tax and spending restraint, wildfire response, transportation, and rural development [S2].

safety.basis: He is a former sheriff who explicitly emphasizes public safety.

experience.basis: He is an incumbent legislator and former county sheriff.

candidates.summary: Willoughby is a challenger emphasizing affordability, education, health-care access, reproductive rights, and rural investment.
highlights: Supports rural investment and reproductive rights [S2].

spending.basis: Willoughby explicitly calls for investment in rural communities.

experience.basis: The dossier identifies her as a challenger and documents no prior elected tenure.
